public static IMethod GetMethod(
	this IMethodConfiguration conf,
	IRouteActivator activator
)

Parameters

conf
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.ConfigIMethodConfiguration
activator
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManagerIRouteActivator

Return Value

Type: IMethod

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type IMethodConfiguration. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
